source.policy: Exact provider_code plus external_movie_id matches only. Do not infer genres from title substrings.
notes: Provider showtime APIs often expose generic labels such as 일반콘텐트 instead of recommendation genres.
Entries here are small, auditable overrides for currently showing movies with direct external or curated evidence.
Ambiguous title-only cases stay untagged until a reliable movie identity is confirmed.

evidenceNotes: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film from the Nintendo/Illumination Mario film line.

Megabox dubbed variant for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.
Megabox premium-format variant for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.
